introSection: Nessi is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently located at Rhyl Children's Village in Rhyl, Denbighshire, Wales, UK. Between 2011 and 2015, the coaster was relocated within the park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train has a dragon theme.

fullText:
Nessi is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently located at Rhyl Children's Village in Rhyl, Denbighshire, Wales, UK. Between 2011 and 2015, the coaster was relocated within the park.

The ride has a single helix.

The train has a dragon theme.
